CREATE TABLE test_strings (s1 UTF8, s2 UTF8) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES ('hello', 'hallo'), ('你好', '你好吗'), ('こんにちは', 'コンニチハ');
SELECT stringJaccardIndexUTF8(s1, '') AS index_empty FROM test_strings;
SELECT stringJaccardIndexUTF8('', '') AS index_both_empty FROM test_strings;
SELECT stringJaccardIndexUTF8('a', 'a') AS index_single_char_same FROM test_strings;
SELECT stringJaccardIndexUTF8('a', 'b') AS index_single_char_diff FROM test_strings;
SELECT stringJaccardIndexUTF8('abc', 'abc') AS index_multiple_char_same FROM test_strings;
SELECT stringJaccardIndexUTF8('abc', 'ab') AS index_multiple_char_diff FROM test_strings;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT stringJaccardIndexUTF8(s1, s2) AS index_val FROM test_strings) WHERE index_val < 1;
SELECT s1, s2, stringJaccardIndexUTF8(s1, s2) AS jaccard_index FROM test_strings WHERE jaccard_index > 0.5;
CREATE TABLE test_strings2 (s1 UTF8, s2 UTF8) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT a.s1, b.s2, stringJaccardIndexUTF8(a.s1, b.s2) AS jaccard_index FROM test_strings AS a JOIN test_strings2 AS b ON a.s1 = b.s1;
SELECT stringJaccardIndexUTF8(s1, s2) FROM (SELECT s1, s2 FROM test_strings ORDER BY s1 LIMIT 10) AS subquery;
SELECT stringJaccardIndexUTF8(s1, s2) AS index_val FROM test_strings GROUP BY index_val HAVING index_val >= 0.5;
